columns.Name: RECOGNITION_ID
columns.Comments: Unique identifier for a recognition

columns.Name: PROGRAM_ID
columns.Comments: Program Identifier

columns.Name: TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Lookup code that indicates type of program

columns.Name: SUB_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Lookup code that indicates subtype of program

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Person Identifier

columns.Name: FROM_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the person who sent recognition

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Assignment Identifier

columns.Name: FROM_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the assignment of the person who sent recognition

columns.Name: RECOGNITION_DATE
columns.Comments: Recognition date

columns.Name: POINTS
columns.Comments: Recognition reward points

columns.Name: HEADLINE
columns.Comments: Headline of the recognition card

columns.Name: MESSAGE
columns.Comments: Message of the recognition card

columns.Name: ILLUSTRATION_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of illustration used in recognition

columns.Name: VALUE1_ID
columns.Comments: First value identifier

columns.Name: VALUE2_ID
columns.Comments: Second value identifier

columns.Name: VALUE3_ID
columns.Comments: Third value identifier

columns.Name: VALUE4_ID
columns.Comments: Fourth value identifier

columns.Name: VALUE5_ID
columns.Comments: Fifth value identifier

columns.Name: PUBLISHED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag that indicated recognition is published

columns.Name: NOTIFIED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag that indicates notification is already sent to employee for the Recognition or Award

columns.Name: VISIBILITY_CODE
columns.Comments: Code that indicates visibility of the awards and recognitions

columns.Name: RECORD_CREATOR
columns.Comments: Creator process of this record. For example, HDL, UI, and ESS.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
